info.title: Milvus REST API
info.description: Milvus open-source vector database RESTful API v2.5. Provides endpoints for collection management, vector CRUD operations, similarity search, index management, partitions, aliases, user/role management (RBAC), and bulk import jobs.

post.description: List all collections in the database
Create a new collection with specified schema and parameters
Get detailed information about a collection
Get statistics of a collection (row count, etc.)
Load a collection into memory for search
Get the loading state of a collection
Insert new vectors into a collection
Insert or update vectors in a collection
Perform hybrid search combining vector and scalar filters
Get vectors by their primary key IDs
Delete vectors by IDs or filter
List all partitions in a collection
Create a new partition in a collection
Drop a partition from a collection
List all indexes on a collection
Create an index on a field
Drop an index from a collection
Create an alias for a collection
Reassign an alias to a different collection
Grant a role to a user
Revoke a role from a user
Grant a privilege to a role
Revoke a privilege from a role
Get the progress of an import job

message.description: Error message if code is non-zero

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token authentication. Token format: username:password
